channel.title: Systemd-Boot on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist
channel.description: Recent content in Systemd-Boot on Murat Kurkoglu | orioninsist

item.title: Arch Hibernate: My Empty /boot/loader/entries/ Fix
item.author: muratkurkoglu@gmail.com (Murat Kurkoglu)
item.description: Couldn't enable hibernate on Arch Linux with systemd-boot? My /boot/loader/entries/ was empty. Here’s the fix: Unified Kernel Images (UKI) and /etc/kernel/cmdline.
